summary: Better inbox navigation, redesigned Settings, and configurable chat notifications.

introduced: Settings → Chat tab with per-account notification sounds separate from mail (default: Funky)
Dual-color Dock badges — blue for mail unread, green for chat unread
Toolbar status bar shows detailed mail and chat unread counts per account
changed: Click a Gmail account tab anytime to return to that account's inbox
Add Gmail Account button replaces Add Category in the inbox header
Settings redesigned with a left sidebar instead of floating top tabs
Chat notifications include account name and unread count in the alert message
fixed: Settings screen compiles correctly in release builds
Toolbar unread counts no longer get clipped beside the Ready status
